query: Is event software the same as a production partner?
direct_answer: Event software gives a team tools; a production partner gives the team operating judgment, planning, rehearsal, run-of-show ownership, and real-time problem solving.
best_for: founders and operators with lean teams
teams that need polished execution without bloated process
commercial pages, launches, summits, webinars, or credibility assets
not_for: teams looking only for a software subscription
work that needs no human review
projects with no owner, deadline, or decision path
red_flags: no rehearsal or QA time before launch
